ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the review was submitted */,
  "user_review" TEXT /* The content of the user's review */,
  "user_suggestion" INTEGER /* Whether the user has provided a suggestion (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Current version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer FOREIGN KEY ("developer") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, moderator, admin) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review where the suggestion was made */,
  "suggestion_text" TEXT /* The text of the user's suggestion */,
  "suggestion_status" TEXT /* Status of the suggestion (e.g., pending, implemented, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggestions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review where the rating was given */,
  "score" INTEGER /* The score given by the user (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, gameplay, graphics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_example" TEXT /* Example of a game in this genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the developer's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  "developer_description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "developer_website" TEXT /* URL to the developer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who earned the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, trophy, exclusive content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the review (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
